title: Rich Italian-Style Paneer Paella
description: A creamy, rich, and savory Italian twist on the classic Spanish paella dish, featuring paneer instead of seafood.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and Italian seasoning, and sauté for 1 minute.
Add Arborio rice and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add crushed tomatoes, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, and cook for 5 minutes.
Add paneer, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Stir in mascarpone cheese until melted and creamy.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with fresh basil, and serve immediately.
